text.title: Tool Description Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping a tool's audit score + side-effect class to the correct rewrite action. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the tool's 5-axis audit score?

conclusion.verdict: keep as-is; recheck on next catalog audit

branch.question: Does the tool have side effects (mutates external state)?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite with MUTATING: prefix + dry-run pair name
rewrite to fill missing axes; keep under 200 tokens

branch.question: Does another tool in the catalog have description-cosine > 0.8 with this one?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite BOTH descriptions with mutual anti-triggers + names
full rewrite from signature using the 5-part template

text.example: score=2 → q-overlap: cosine(search_docs, grep_repo) = 0.86 → anti-trigger-required-on-overlap. Rewrite both, each pointing to the other by name.
